# MarConsNetData

The goal of MarConsNetData is to facilitate the acquisition of data for
the Maritimes Conservation Network

## Installation

You can install the development version of MarConsNetData from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("dfo-mar-mpas/MarConsNetData")
```

## Example

This is a basic example which shows you how to solve a common problem:

``` r
library(MarConsNetData)

bioregion <- data_bioregion()
#> Warning in CPL_crs_from_input(x): GDAL Message 1: +init=epsg:XXXX syntax is
#> deprecated. It might return a CRS with a non-EPSG compliant axis order.
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`MarConsNetData`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/MarConsNetData-package.md)
  [`MarConsNetData-package`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/MarConsNetData-package.md)
  : A Package for Locating and Transforming MPA Data

- [`data_CPCAD_areas()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/data_CPCAD_areas.md)
  : Get Canadian Protected and Conserved Areas Database

- [`data_DFO_sp_lists()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/data_DFO_sp_lists.md)
  : Extract species lists from DFO website

- [`data_EBSA()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/data_EBSA.md)
  : Get Ecologically and Biologically Significant Area Data

- [`data_KBA()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/data_KBA.md)
  : Get Key Biological Areas (KBA) Data

- [`data_LFA()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/data_LFA.md)
  : Get Lobster Fishing Areas

- [`data_MarRV_survey_open()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/data_MarRV_survey_open.md)
  : Download the Maritimes Summer Research Vessel Survey data from
  open.canada.ca

- [`data_OBIS()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/data_OBIS.md)
  : Get Ocean Biodiversity Information System (OBIS) data

- [`data_PAVICS()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/data_PAVICS.md)
  : Get climate data

- [`data_SAR_CH()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/data_SAR_CH.md)
  : Get Species at Risk Critical Habitat Data

- [`data_SBA()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/data_SBA.md)
  : Get Coral and Sponge Significant Benthic Areas in Eastern
  Canada (2016) Data

- [`data_biophysical_units()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/data_biophysical_units.md)
  : Get Biophysical Units Data

- [`data_bioregion()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/data_bioregion.md)
  : Get Bio Region Information Data

- [`data_commercial_fishing()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/data_commercial_fishing.md)
  : Get Eastern Canada Commercial Fishing data

- [`data_context()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/data_context.md)
  : Get Context from Canadian Protected and Conserved Areas

- [`data_draft_areas()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/data_draft_areas.md)
  : Get draft conservation network sites

- [`data_eDNA()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/data_eDNA.md)
  : Build a cleaned eDNA sampling dataset from the raw eDNA-for-MPAs
  directory

- [`data_geomorphic_units()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/data_geomorphic_units.md)
  : Get Geomorphic Unit Data

- [`data_objectives()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/data_objectives.md)
  : Get Objectives from Canadian Protected and Conserved Areas

- [`data_planning_areas()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/data_planning_areas.md)
  : Get Marine Spatial Planning Areas Data

- [`data_wind_energy_areas()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/data_wind_energy_areas.md)
  :

  data_wind_energy_areas Download and read the Wind Energy Areas (WEA)
  dataset from the Canada-Nova Scotia Offshore Energy Regulator
  [(CNSOER)](https://cnsoer.ca/renewable-energy/lands-management/governments-designated-offshore-wind-energy-areas).

- [`taxize_data()`](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/reference/taxize_data.md)
  : Group species into taxonomic groups

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [obis](https://dfo-mar-mpas.github.io/MarConsNetData/articles/obis.md):
